title: ctenitis dentata
intro: Ctenitis dentata, also known as the tooth-lobed ctenitis, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis dentata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Ctenitis dentata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, to harness its medicinal properties.
